entries.summary: Phase 4: 6 tasks completed. 4 ALIGNED, 2 MINOR_DRIFT (acceptable). Task 4.2: CORS includes DELETE because endpoint exists from Phase 1. Task 4.3: Code correctly limits /stats response to non-sensitive fields, but USAGE.md documentation needs update to match new format. All API contract fixes implemented: /search docs aligned, CORS restricted, /stats leakage fixed, validate_url consolidated, exception handling improved, path traversal protected.
